news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态TVL本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked in DeFi rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s cross-chain interoperability protocol CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its multi-chain capabilities.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 for Lower Fees
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币基金会研究小组提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation’s research group proposes a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
